hero_subtitle: An AI that truly understands Bengali
hero_tagline: Built for Bengali. Not adapted to it.
why_title: Bengali deserves better AI — and now it has it
why_subtitle: Over 230 million people speak Bengali. Yet almost every major AI model fails in Bengali. We built something to change that.
why_card_1_desc: Bengali is the 6th most spoken language on Earth, yet it remains severely underrepresented in modern AI. Models that excel in English stumble badly in Bengali.
why_card_2_desc: Existing models generate factually wrong answers, meaningless sentences, and even mix in English when prompted in Bengali. This isn't just inconvenient — it's harmful.
why_card_3_desc: Bengali LLM is fine-tuned specifically on Bengali data. The result: accurate answers, fluent conversations, and reliable information — all in authentic Bengali.
how_subtitle: State-of-the-art architecture, precisely calibrated for Bengali.
how_step_1_desc: Qwen 2.5-3B-Instruct — a powerful multilingual base with efficient architecture suited for low-resource languages.
how_step_2_desc: Trained on BanglaRQA and instruction datasets covering real-world Bengali language scenarios.
how_step_3_desc: Maximum efficiency with minimal resources. 4-bit quantization enables fast, lightweight inference.
how_step_4_desc: Multi-dimensional quality assurance using F1 Score, ROUGE, and METEOR metrics.
datasets_subtitle: A model trained on real Bengali — not machine-translated approximations.
dataset_1_desc: Bengali reading comprehension QA dataset with passage–question–answer triplets covering factual recall and comprehension tasks.
dataset_2_desc: Covers emotional support, advice, social interaction, historical discussions, civic processes, and daily conversations in Bengali.
dataset_3_desc: A strong multilingual model chosen for its efficient architecture and low-resource suitability as a foundation for Bengali fine-tuning.
comparison_subtitle: Drag the slider to see the before and after — the difference is undeniable.
chat_subtitle: Ask in Bengali. Get answers that are actually in Bengali.
chat_initial_msg: Namaskar! I am your Bengali AI assistant. How can I help you today?
chat_feedback_footer: Model results may vary. Your feedback is valuable.
footer_tagline: Built for Bengali. Not adapted to it.
